channel.title: LLM Timeline — Inflection AI Models
channel.description: Large Language Model releases from Inflection AI.

item.title: Inflection-3 Pi (3.0) (Inflection AI)
item.description: Parameters: Inflection-3 Pi (3.0) License: open Type: model Inference via Intel Gaudi® 3 128 GB, on-premise available. Minimum spend $100 credits.

item.title: Inflection-3 Productivity (3.0) (Inflection AI)
item.description: Parameters: Inflection-3 Productivity (3.0) License: open Type: model Inference via Intel Gaudi® 3 128 GB, on-premise available. Minimum spend $100 credits.

item.title: Inflection-2.5 (Inflection AI)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by Inflection AI

item.title: Inflection-2.5 (Inflection AI)
item.description: Parameters: Inflection-2.5 License: open Type: model

item.title: Inflection-2 (Inflection AI)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by Inflection AI

item.title: Inflection-2 (Inflection AI)
item.description: Parameters: Inflection-2 License: open Type: model “now the 2nd best LLM in the world”. Finished training 19/Nov/2023, waiting for fine-tuning and release.

item.title: Inflection-1 (Inflection AI)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by Inflection AI

item.title: Inflection-1 (Inflection AI)
item.description: Parameters: Inflection-1 License: open Type: model Comparable with benchmarking results from InternLM 104B, 1-2% better. ‘Inflection-1 was trained using thousands of NVIDIA H100 GPUs on a very large dataset.’

item.title: Pi (Inflection AI)
item.description: Parameters: Pi License: open Type: model No indication of params/tokens. Devs from DeepMind.
